population_state_definitions.not_registered: The population is named but has no executable registered authority.
population_state_definitions.inventory_only: Retained inventory bounds the source area but is not an executable denominator.
population_state_definitions.bounded_profile: A content-identified strict subset has executable evidence; the full population remains undefined or incomplete.
population_state_definitions.complete_authority: The complete raw and normalized populations are content-identified, independently reproducible, and executable.

axis_state_definitions.not_started: No executable paired evidence currently earns credit on this complete-parity axis.
axis_state_definitions.partial: Bounded retained evidence earns scoped credit, but at least one required population or terminal condition remains open.
axis_state_definitions.complete: Every required complete population passes the axis-specific terminal exit with retained paired evidence.

populations.label: toolchain/bootstrap

evidence.detail: Pinned release, source-tree inventory, bootstrap scope, and platform tiers.
Current bounded official-Lean cross-check job; this is not the full bootstrap authority.

populations.residual: Freeze stage0/stage1/stage2 build, test, compiler, runtime, and bootstrap-equivalence manifests.

populations.label: kernel/core

evidence.detail: Twelve content-identified assurance rows across K0-K6.
Seven selected official construct families with exact source, wire, and product evidence.

populations.residual: Define the dependency-closed complete core-term and declaration population, including invalid mutations.

populations.label: official Lean tests

evidence.detail: Pinned CMake/CTest registration authority for 3,678 default and 3,723 full-Lake cases, with exact content, command, property, sidecar, output-policy, and support-scope identities; outcomes remain not run.
Generated bounded profile summary and explicit non-terminal residual.
Pinned dynamic-workflow derivation for 17 official event contexts, 153 job cells, 111 not-run CTest attempts, and eight exact factored selection sets.
Generated context, attempt, filter, stage, and selection-set summary with zero execution or paired-result credit.
TL0.6.2 result, reproduction commands, exact corrections, assurance boundary, and TL0.6.3 handoff.
TL0.7.1 contract authority for explicit resource lanes, typed terminations, immutable run/attempt/case/artifact/completion records, and zero real outcomes.
Generated two-lane, twelve-termination, five-control, nineteen-mutation review surface with no process credit.
TL0.7.1 result, source-first order, corrections, non-claims, and process/durability handoff.
TL0.7.4 authority retaining one failed compile plus two completed no-credit real controls through the process/store path; every U2 and parity counter remains zero.
Bounded TL0.7 closure and explicit handoff to source-first official U2 execution.
Source-first one-case child-shard registration for the release-tag Linux-release selection.
Two-attempt M0 authority retaining one incomplete process failure and one decided local official failure outcome; zero passes, Axeyum outcomes, pairs, performance rows, and parity credit.
Bounded R1 result, exact evidence identities, source-backed LEAN_CC adapter diagnosis, and explicit non-claims.
Preregistered attempt-003 correction using the released toolchain compiler without reinterpreting R1's failure.
Three-attempt authority retaining attempt 003's direct-entry import failure, absent roots, exact embedded process transcript, zero new outcomes, and zero parity credit.
Bounded R2 invocation result, Python path root cause, and explicit non-claims.
Preregistered attempt-004 direct-entry correction with the R2 invocation authority frozen and no execution credit.
Pinned tests tree inventory and the required CTest/test-pile derivation rule.

populations.residual: Current execution coverage is three process attempts but only one decided local official failure outcome from a 3,678-case parent, with zero official passes, Axeyum outcomes, or pairs. Attempt 003 stopped before runner import and adds no outcome. Implement the preregistered direct-entry-corrected R3 case, then every derived official profile with exact executable/environment/resource/attempt/case/completion evidence; classify native surfaces and run matched Axeyum cases. Registration plus one failed local outcome is not complete U2 authority.
